sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) skill of an artificer, dexterity, Exo 28:3 31:6 36:1 , Exo 36:2.

(2) wisdom, see more as to the idea which this comprises, under the word חָכָם No. 2, Job 11:6 12:2 , 12 Job 12:12 15:8 26:3 28:18 . It comprehends various learning, Dan 1:17 piety towards God ( Job 28:28); it is ascribed to a ruler, Deu 34:9 to a king [Messiah], Isa 11:2 in a greater and more eminent sense to God, Job 12:13 28:12 , seq.

חכמה

Ch. id. Dan 2:20.
